CREATE TABLE clients (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ip_address VARCHAR(45));
SELECT ip FROM clients WHERE ip_address = ip;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients WHERE ip_address LIKE '192.168.%';
SELECT clients.id, ip_address FROM clients WHERE ip_address IN (SELECT ip_address FROM clients WHERE id < 3);
CREATE TABLE requests (req_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, client_id INTEGER REFERENCES clients(id), request_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT r.req_id, c.ip_address FROM requests r JOIN clients c ON r.client_id = c.id WHERE c.ip_address IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM requests) AS total_requests, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients) AS total_clients;
SELECT r.req_id, c.ip_address FROM requests r JOIN clients c ON r.client_id = c.id WHERE c.ip_address = http_client_ip();
